title: Overtime 350 | High Back Heavy Duty Multi-Tilter MVL13040
brand_hint: OTG / Offices to Go (look for MVL or OTG model code)

specs.materials: Heavy-duty steel frame, memory foam seat top, Luxhide bonded leather or grade 1 textile upholstery
key_features: Long-term comfort seat with memory foam top
Infinite position tilt lock and tilt tension adjustment
Infinite position back and seat angle adjustment including forward tilt
Height- and width-adjustable arms with sliding/pivoting armrest pads with lock
specs.notes: Specs confirmed from OTG manufacturer page. Warranty and specific BIFMA/GREENGUARD certifications not explicitly listed on the model page; OTG typically offers a limited lifetime warranty on seating but this should be verified on the product spec sheet PDF before publishing. MVL13040F was the previous SKU for grade 1 textile variant.
